description_long: This object depicts a male police officer in a standard dark blue patrol uniform, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. The uniform includes a buttoned shirt with a visible badge on the left chest, shoulder patches, and a utility belt equipped with various tools. The officer wears dark trousers and black shoes, and his hair is neatly tied back. The utility belt appears to hold items such as a radio, handcuffs, and pouches. The officer's sleeves are long, and the shirt is tucked into the pants, giving a professional and authoritative appearance.
description: A male police officer in a dark blue patrol uniform with a badge, shoulder patches, and a utility belt, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's face, badge, chest details, and full uniform with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the officer's profile, utility belt equipment, and hair tied back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, belt, and the officer's overall posture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the officer's profile, utility belt, and arm details.
attribute_uniform_type: Standard police patrol uniform with long-sleeve dark blue shirt, matching trousers, black shoes, and a fully equipped utility belt.
